notes: Single self-contained HTML, no libraries. Layered parallax (sun glow + sky gradient, wisp/puff clouds, flapping birds, far/mid mountain ranges with snow caps, rolling hills, tree band with three variants, roadside poles with lamp glow + speed/curve signs, scrolling lane dashes, foreground tufts + dust bands) with continuous modulo scroll for a seamless loop. dt-based timing; DPR-aware full-page canvas; spinning wheels tied to speed; subtle body bob + pitch; cinematic sunset palette with stars in the upper sky band and warm haze along the horizon. Includes headlight cone, tail-light glow, and windshield reflection.
